steps.title: Distribute the factor
steps.content:
Multiply $12$ by each term inside the parentheses, because the whole quantity $x+9$ is being multiplied by $12$.
$$12(x+9)=12\cdot x+12\cdot9$$

steps.title: Simplify the products
steps.content:
The variable term becomes $12x$, and the constant term becomes $108$.
$$12\cdot x+12\cdot9=12x+108$$

steps.title: Compare with the choices
steps.content: Choice A leaves $9$ undistributed. Choice C adds $12$ and $9$. Choice D subtracts instead of multiplying. Choice B gives $12x+108$. The answer is B.
